Everything is completed through our secured email system.  When your LO is ready to submit just have them email me the borrower’s last name and I can send them a link.
Here is the need’s list I send out:
 
I just need you to send me the following items through our secured email portal.  Please separate and label all attachments:
1003
1008
Income Docs (pay stubs/w-2’s and full tax returns, both business and personal if self-employed)
If your borrower is self-employed, we need YTD P&Ls along with January-May Business Bank Statements
All asset statements (all pages, please list any retirement account @ 50%)
Credit Report
Condo Questionnaire Form (if applicable)
Document PITI on all REO properties
Executed Sale Contract (if applicable)
FNMA 3.2 File
 
Please send me the borrower’s last names on your submission.  I’ll send you a secured link to upload all these items securely.
